name: Mel's Mexican Rice Anb Tuna (Arroz Con Atun)
recipeIngredient: 1 Large can tuna in spring water, drained
recipeInstructions:
Long narrow yellow peppers such as guero, x-ca-tic, or Hungarian wax.
Blend 1 cup of the chicken broth with the red tomato. In a large skillet or saucepan, heat the oil and add the garlic. When it turns golden, add the rice and stir until golden. Add the onion and peppers (remove stems) and sauté for an additional 3 minutes. Add the blended tomato mixture. Bring to a boil, then add the remaining chicken broth. Add all other ingredients. Return to a simmer when everything is absorbed. Remove bay leaf before serving.
